历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 12804 → 13243 → 15192 → 19846 → 22830, showing a continuous backward trend. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 7600 places, with a baseline of about 22830 in 2025. The planned enrollment numbers for science (physics category) from 2021 to 2025 were 99 → 110 → 114 → 122 → 126, with a steady small expansion. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 118, a decrease of 8 (-6.3%) compared to 2025, marking the first contraction, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 74th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a steady rise in recent years (78th in 2021 → 74th in 2026). The 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly involving sports honors such as the men's volleyball championship and university management responses. Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 966,000, and short video exposure at an upper-middle level. In 2023, there was a low-attention discussion about admission score comparisons, with no obvious record of score drops. Food Science and Engineering is rated A+ (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A+ discipline of the university, directly corresponding to majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Food Quality and Safety in the enrollment list.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, along with Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, aligning with the university's strong medical and engineering disciplines. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) compared to 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the first contraction in 2026 (-6.3%), a slight decrease in the total number of candidates (-3.4%), and a positive reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 22830, the contraction will cause the ranking to move forward somewhat, but the decrease in candidates and positive reputation partially offset the impact of contraction. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 21991, with a range of 21491-22491.
